text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... It has come at last,
Trainer—our first major clash with the generation
of yesteryear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've had several opportunities to challenge them
before.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, only a stage of this magnitude will
suffice for my opening ceremony.
choice_data_list: They won't be holding back, either.
They won't be holding back, either.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Both Special Week and Grass Wonder
have come, thus fulfilling their promises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Their grit has earned my respect. I, though, shall
be victorious!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Today's the big day, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please, pay me no mind. I myself will be heeding
no distractions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe! Snort! That posture... That extreme focus...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is your essence, through and through. You
two are worth surpassing—twin peaks of the older
generation, Grass and Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O turns to the fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, spectators whose hearts beat with
adoration for Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today, I stand on the track of the Arima Kinen for
the first time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is the past versus the present. Here I am, to ring
the opening bell...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And to serenade the architects of a golden age
with respect—and foreboding doom!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once the gates open, the sun shall sink into the
horizon, plunging Nakayama Racecourse into a
prolonged night.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The battle shall unfold in the deepest darkness,
growing ever darker even as dawn approaches.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter how horrific the ensuing strife
becomes, not a soul shall sleep... until this score is
settled once and for all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, I shall arise the victor, bringing
with me a new, shining dawn!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Witness it with your own eyes, you spectators!
The dawn of a new age!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, set forth, we leaders of our times! Onto the
arena of this singular encounter!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gladly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fire Opera O has lit burns in the eyes of her
two competitors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's taking the leap from being the Overlord of
her generation to the Centurial Overlord of all
generations... Her true battle is about to begin!
